choose a throne:

Event: Mermaid Adventure
Event Date: 11/06/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: E44
Siren Song Engraving

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while the engraving owner marks the enemy unit with the highest max health for 3 sec. The engraving owner deals magic damage equal to 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% of their spell power to the selected unit every second. If the ability kills the target, the engraving owner's spell power is increased by 4% / 5% / 6% / 7% / 8% / 9% / 10% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 8 times.

Enhancement: 2
2000 Magic damage from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner marks the enemy unit with the highest max health for 4 sec. The engraving owner deals pure damage equal to 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% of their spell power to the selected unit every second. If the ability kills the target, the engraving owner's spell power is increased by 9% / 10% / 11% / 12% / 13% / 14% / 15% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 8 times.

Enhancement: 3
4000 Magic damage from the gems
Once in a while the engraving owner marks the enemy unit with the highest max health for 5 sec. The engraving owner deals magic damage equal to 14% / 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 19% / 20% of their spell power to the selected unit every second. This damage ignores shields and damage-reducing effects. If the ability kills the target, the engraving owner's spell power is increased by 14% / 15% / 16% / 17% / 18% / 19% / 20% until the end of the battle. Stacks up to 8 times.

Requirements:

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Mermaid Adventure

Event date: 11/06/2025

Sage bot code: E44

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
